name: yxj-paper-os
description: Model-led sparse paper-planning Codex plugin with composable academic lenses and scoped writing handoffs.

interface.shortDescription: Prepare paper projects for downstream writing with a design pack.
interface.longDescription: YXJ Paper OS prepares paper-planning workspaces with a cognitive kernel, conditional academic lenses, sparse traceable records, and scoped writing handoffs without drafting manuscripts or executing downstream skills.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use yxj-paper-os to prepare my paper project information and compile a writing design pack.
